pr.title: Melee decomp: LB and MP utility matches
pr.author: fjooord

summary: Exact-match decompilation slice for LB utility and MP collision/library helpers. The PR body claims 11 newly exact functions across 5 implementation files with zero slice regressions; metadata shows 6 changed files including removal of mplib.static.h content. Review focused on replacing local/imported helper or data-symbol workarounds with existing imports, direct literals, and inline source expressions.

key_files.role: LB utility match work; inlined lb_800115F4 helper logic, adjusted local declaration/order and PAD_STACK in lb_80014638, and handled review on sqrtf import and inlineC0 removal.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: lb_800115F4 inlineB0 removal and total_scale accumulation
diff_excerpt: lb_80014638 inlineC0 removal, absolute-value check/division folded into function

key_files.role: LB collision geometry matching/refactor; renamed many temp_f variables into geometric roles and changed lbColl_80006094 return type from int to bool in diff excerpt.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: lbColl_80006094 temp_f variables renamed to d1/d2/dot/len/denom terms
diff_excerpt: PAD_STACK moved/narrowed near return path

key_files.role: LB math helper match work; changed file metadata lists small implementation changes, and bot report lists fn_8001E910 as newly matched plus fn_8001F2A4/fn_8001ECF4 improvements.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: lbmthp fn_8001E910 new match; fn_8001F2A4 and fn_8001ECF4 improved

key_files.role: MP collision match work; review requested replacing a float bit-cast/data-symbol read with direct F32_MAX assignment in mpColl_80046224_LeftWall.
evidence_refs: review_comments: discussion r3410071069 requested inline this on mpColl_804D6490_max_x assignment
review_comments: discussion r3410669846 says resolved with direct F32_MAX and ninja OK

key_files.role: Major MP library match work; included mpLib_DrawCrosses cleanup, data/literal handling, new matches and many unmatched improvements.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: mplib new matches mpLinesConnected, mpLib_80055E9C, mpLib_80057BC0, mpCheckFloor, mpLib_80058820 and several improvements

key_files.role: Static header cleanup/removal of declarations or data surfaced by MP library changes.

what_changed: PR body describes exact-match decompilation for LB utility and MP collision/library helpers, adding 11 newly exact functions across 5 files.
Changed-file metadata lists 6 touched files: lb_00F9.c, lbcollision.c, lbmthp.c, mpcoll.c, mplib.c, and mplib.static.h.
lb_800115F4 absorbed the prior inlineB0 helper shape, keeping a running total_scale while iterating and relinking lb_80011A50_t nodes.
lb_80014638 removed inlineC0 and folded the z interpolation/near-zero absolute-value check directly into the function; PAD_STACK changed from 4 to 8 in the excerpt.
lbColl_80006094 changed return type from int to bool in the excerpt and replaced temp_f-style locals with geometric names such as d1_x, d2_len_sq, d1_dot_d2, offset_delta_x, and denom.
mpColl_80046224_LeftWall review resolution states the max-x assignment now uses F32_MAX directly instead of a float bit-cast through mpColl_804D7FA0.
mpLib_DrawCrosses review resolution states six GXPosition3f32 calls now inline 3.0F rather than reading mpLib_804D8124[0].
A temporary lbl_803BF570 placeholder near mpLib_DrawCrosses was reported resolved by expressing spawn vertex offsets/data directly with the current enum/data layout.
PR body verification claims slice and full ship-set regression reports with 0 broken matches, 0 fuzzy regressions, 0 metric regressions, git diff --check passing, and review_lint 0 errors.
smart_moves: Used semantic local names for vector math in lbcollision.c, making dot products, squared lengths, offsets, and denominator calculations reviewable without inventing global semantics.
Resolved review by preferring ordinary source literals and constants, such as F32_MAX and 3.0F, over address-based data reads when the review evidence indicated the direct source form matched.
Removed one-use helper shapes such as inlineB0/inlineC0 where review or diff evidence supported folding the calculation into the owning function.
Kept verification evidence visible in PR body and resolution comments, including ninja OK comments for specific review fixes.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For small one-use helpers produced during matching, review may prefer folding the expression into the owning function when that better reflects local source shape and still verifies.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: inlineB0 removed and folded into lb_800115F4
review_comments: r3410069971 requested inline this for inlineC0
review_comments: r3410669756 says inlineC0 removed and verified with ninja

decomp_lessons.lesson: When matching math-heavy collision functions, replacing temp_f register names with role names for vectors, dot products, squared lengths, scale factors, and denominators can preserve the expression structure while improving reviewability.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: temp_f25/temp_f7/temp_f10 etc. renamed to d1_y, d2_len_sq, d1_dot_d2, denom, scale

decomp_lessons.lesson: Literal or constant expressions should not be replaced with address-based data reads merely to chase data or relocation shape when direct source constants verify.
evidence_refs: review_comments: r3410669846 direct F32_MAX assignment verified
review_comments: r3410669902 six GXPosition3f32 calls now inline 3.0F and verified

decomp_lessons.lesson: If a function-local implementation of a standard/library inline appears, first look for the owning imported header or existing implementation rather than adding a bespoke local extern inline.
evidence_refs: review_comments: r3410069690 asks can you import this from somewhere?
review_comments: r3410130286 says That's the math_ppc.h version

naming_conventions.convention: Use short geometric role names for math-heavy locals when the role is directly visible: d1_x/d1_y/d1_z, d2_x/d2_y/d2_z, *_len_sq, *_dot_*, offset_delta_*, denom, scale.
Use local pointer/count names that describe iteration roles, such as idx_ptr, out_vtx, idx_i, and out_count, instead of var_rXX/temp_rXX names when roles are known.
evidence_refs: review_comments: mpLib_DrawCrosses hunk shows var_r31/var_r30/temp_r29 replaced by idx_ptr/out_vtx and len_r27 by out_count

naming_conventions.convention: Keep address-style labels for placeholders only when semantics are not yet recovered; review resolution indicates temporary lbl_803BF570 was removed once spawn vertex data could be expressed with current enum/data layout.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was adjusted or relocated in matching work, including lb_80014638 changing PAD_STACK(4) to PAD_STACK(8) and lbColl_80006094 moving from an early PAD_STACK(80) to a later PAD_STACK(72) in the excerpt.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Stack padding is a narrow matching tactic and should remain tied to local verification evidence.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: slice regression report 11 new matches, 0 broken/fuzzy/metric regressions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declaration ordering and local lifetime changes were used for MWCC-sensitive codegen, visible in lb_80012994 variable reorder and lbcollision locals moved across inner scopes.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Supported by diff and PR verification, but exact reason for each declaration move is not explicitly explained in comments.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: lb_80012994 f32 y_p1, x_p1, y_m1, x_m1 ordering

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Inline direct source expressions instead of helper calls or data-symbol reads when review and verification show the direct form matches.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Grounded for inlineC0, F32_MAX, and 3.0F cases only; not a blanket rule for all helpers or data.

review_feedback.feedback: Reviewer asked whether the locally added sqrtf/__frsqrte implementation could be imported from somewhere; another reviewer identified it as the math_ppc.h version.
review_feedback.resolution_evidence: Review excerpt includes the comments, but the loaded slice does not show final include/import diff for this exact issue.
Author replied that inlineC0 was removed and its calculation folded directly into lb_80014638 with inline absolute-value check/division; verified with ninja build/GALE01/main.dol OK.

review_feedback.feedback: Reviewer requested inlining a data/bit-cast expression for max_x.
review_feedback.resolution_evidence: Author replied that mpColl_804D6490_max_x now assigns F32_MAX directly and verified with ninja build/GALE01/main.dol OK.

review_feedback.feedback: Reviewer requested inlining mpLib_DrawCrosses values instead of reading mpLib_804D8124[0].
review_feedback.resolution_evidence: Author replied that six GXPosition3f32 calls now inline 3.0F and verified with ninja build/GALE01/main.dol OK.

review_feedback.feedback: Reviewer requested inlining/removing a temporary lbl_803BF570 placeholder near item spawn vertex data.
review_feedback.resolution_evidence: Author replied the placeholder is gone and spawn vertex offsets/data are expressed directly with current enum/data layout; verified with ninja build/GALE01/main.dol OK.

follow_up_queries: PR 2683 math_ppc.h sqrtf import final diff lb_00F9.c
lbColl_80006094 denom d1_dot_d2 d2_len_sq matching tactic
PR 2683 lbl_803BF570 spawn vertex offsets enum data layout

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, author, changed file metadata
human_pr_text: PR body summary and verification
review_comments.md: review comments and several resolution comments, truncated
notes: Changed-file list and PR body are complete enough for file and verification summary.
Diff and review comments are truncated, so not every hunk or review thread is visible.

PR body claims 11 new exact functions, while the visible bot report excerpt lists 9 new matches and one unmatched .sdata2 regression before later author summary; final PR body is treated as stronger for final slice verification but the discrepancy is noted.
Resolution for the sqrtf/math_ppc.h import issue is implied by review discussion but not shown in a final loaded diff hunk.
No source updates are applied by this intake record; candidates are routed for curator review.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Inline one-use helper artifacts when review and obj/build evidence support the owning-function expression
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2683, inlineB0/inlineC0-style helper shapes in lb_00F9.c were removed or folded into the owning functions, with author resolution for inlineC0 explicitly verified by ninja.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer direct literals/constants over address-based data reads when review shows the literal source form verifies
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2683 review resolutions replaced a float bit-cast/data-symbol path with F32_MAX and changed mpLib_DrawCrosses to inline 3.0F in six GXPosition3f32 calls, each with ninja OK evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use geometric role names in collision math once roles are locally clear
accepted_candidate_records.text: The lbcollision.c diff replaced temp_f-style locals with d1/d2 component names, dot products, squared lengths, offset deltas, scale, and denom names in lbColl_80006094.

source_update_candidates.title: Check existing SDK/project headers before adding local copies of library inlines
source_update_candidates.text: Review on PR #2683 flagged a locally added sqrtf/__frsqrte inline and identified it as the math_ppc.h version. A possible standard update is to prefer importing existing SDK/project header inlines over adding TU-local copies when the operation is owned elsewhere.
source_update_candidates.reason: Supported by review comments, but final import diff is not visible in the loaded slice; curator should verify against source/header ownership before promoting.

source_update_candidates.title: Avoid data-symbol reads for ordinary constants when direct literals/constants match
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2683 review resolutions favored direct F32_MAX and direct 3.0F over a float bit-cast/data-symbol read and mpLib_804D8124[0] reads. This may reinforce existing literals-and-data-ownership and text-before-data-matching standards.
source_update_candidates.reason: Likely already covered by loaded standards; curator can decide whether this PR should become an example rather than a new standard.

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/mp/mplib.c owns mpLib_DrawCrosses and item spawn vertex/data layout work in this slice
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2683 review comments tie mpLib_DrawCrosses, GXPosition3f32 cross drawing, mpLib_804D8124[0], lbl_803BF570, and spawn vertex offsets/data layout to src/melee/mp/mplib.c.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful path fact, but should be checked against current source before adding.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's '11 newly exact functions' into a per-symbol final match list beyond the symbols visible in the loaded bot report and excerpts; full final diff/report is partially truncated.
Do not infer that all one-use helpers should always be inlined; this PR only supports specific inlineB0/inlineC0/literal cases with review/build evidence.
Do not treat PAD_STACK changes here as general style; loaded standards require narrow verifier evidence for stack-padding tactics.
Do not claim final sqrtf import mechanics because the loaded slice shows review identification of math_ppc.h but not the final include/import hunk.
